5/5 green. Here's the full structured output:

---

## Implementation Summary

**What was built:** `WarehouseService` ‚Äî a domain service for retrieving and updating warehouses, following the `ProductService` pattern exactly.

**Approach:** Mirrored the ProductService structure file-for-file:
- Shared `AppError` class extracted into `.tmp/shared/` (same as the spec's `../shared/app-error`)
- Repository interface + domain type co-located in `warehouse-repository.ts`
- Service in `warehouse-service.ts`, injecting the repo via constructor
- `updateCapacity` delegates to `getWarehouse` internally so the not-found guard is reused, not duplicated

**Files changed:**

| Path | Action | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `.tmp/shared/app-error.ts` | created | Shared `AppError` class (code + message), matches pattern |
| `.tmp/warehouses/warehouse-repository.ts` | created | `Warehouse` domain type + `WarehouseRepository` interface |
| `.tmp/warehouses/warehouse-service.ts` | created | `WarehouseService` with `getWarehouse` + `updateCapacity` |
| `.tmp/warehouses/warehouse-service.test.ts` | created | 5 Jest tests covering all 3 ACs + edge cases |

---

## Acceptance Criteria Coverage

| Criterion | Status | Test | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| AC1: existing ID ‚Üí warehouse returned | implemented | `AC1: returns the warehouse when the ID exists` | Verifies return value and that `findById` was called with the right ID |
| AC2: missing ID ‚Üí throw `WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND` | implemented | `AC2: throws WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND...` + `AC2: error is an AppError instance` | Two tests: one for the error code shape, one for the `AppError` class and message content |
| AC3: valid warehouse + new capacity ‚Üí updated and saved | implemented | `AC3: updates the warehouse capacity and persists it` + guard test | Verifies `repo.save` called with mutated capacity; also covers the not-found guard path |

---

## Tests

| File | Covers | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `warehouse-service.test.ts` | AC1 ‚Äî found warehouse returned | unit |
| `warehouse-service.test.ts` | AC2 ‚Äî not-found error code | unit |
| `warehouse-service.test.ts` | AC2 ‚Äî error is `AppError`, message contains ID | unit |
| `warehouse-service.test.ts` | AC3 ‚Äî capacity mutated and `save` called | unit |
| `warehouse-service.test.ts` | AC3 edge ‚Äî `updateCapacity` on missing warehouse throws, `save` never called | unit |

---

## Deviations

None. Implementation matches the spec and ProductService pattern exactly.

---

## Confidence

```
confidence:
  level: 99
  high_confidence_areas:
    - Pattern fidelity (file layout, constructor injection, AppError usage)
    - All 3 ACs covered with direct test assertions
    - updateCapacity delegates to getWarehouse ‚Äî no duplicated guard logic
  low_confidence_areas:
    - Warehouse domain type fields (id, name, capacity) ‚Äî inferred from common sense, not a spec
  assumptions:
    - Warehouse has at minimum id, name, and capacity fields
    - Repository is async (Promise-based), matching ProductRepository pattern
```
